g.aria-label: Symbol legend for fill color with 2 values: Brain gain, Brain drain
Title text 'Brain drain by town — YNYCA graduate net gain rate'
g.text: Brain drain by town — YNYCA graduate net gain rate

g.aria-label: Subtitle text 'Net gain rate = graduates arriving minus leaving, as share of local cohort. Right panel: share of all graduates from that town confirmed leaving Yorkshire entirely (movers × regional exit rate). 15 of 17 YNYCA towns are net losers of graduates. Source: ONS Graduate Retention Study.'

text.tspan: Net gain rate = graduates arriving minus leaving, as share of local cohort.
Right panel: share of all graduates from that town confirmed leaving Yorkshire entirely (movers × regional exit rate).
15 of 17 YNYCA towns are net losers of graduates. Source: ONS Graduate Retention Study.
